is_enabled=True fix — UAT revealed session hidden from overlay without this

blockers.description: SMTC overlay on Win11 VM shows 'Unknown app' + python path instead of MusicStreamer identity + music metadata
blockers.workaround: Partial — standalone QApplication reproducer WITH publish_metadata works (shows 'Drone Zone' / 'Test ICY Title'). Real MainWindow app shows transport buttons but no music metadata. Root cause not yet isolated.

blockers.description: Audio pause/restart glitch + volume setting ignored on Win11 VM
blockers.workaround: Separate bug from SMTC. Backlog item, not blocking Phase 43.1.
Needs `ctypes.windll.shell32.SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID('org.lightningjim.MusicStreamer')` at app startup before QApplication is constructed. Not yet applied.

human_actions_pending.action: Add AUMID (SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID) to musicstreamer/__main__.py so Windows overlay shows 'MusicStreamer' instead of python.exe path
human_actions_pending.context: UAT-1 partially working — overlay appears but shows 'Unknown app'. AUMID is the standard Windows fix.

human_actions_pending.action: pip uninstall PySide6 / conda install -c conda-forge pyside6 on any future Win11 setup — pip PySide6 has ABI mismatch with conda-forge GStreamer env
human_actions_pending.context: Pitfall-In-The-Wild #1 documented in 43.1-UAT.md. Should land in pyproject.toml comment + Windows runbook.

decisions.decision: Must explicitly set smtc.is_enabled = True after configuring button flags
decisions.rationale: Default is False. Buttons configured + button_pressed subscribed + backend constructed but session stays hidden from Win+V/overlay without this. UAT-discovered Pitfall #7.

decisions.decision: D-03 revised — thumbnail via InMemoryRandomAccessStream, NOT file:// URI
decisions.rationale: create_from_uri only accepts http/https/ms-appx/ms-appdata; file:// rejected. Research Pitfall #2.

decisions.decision: PySide6 must install via conda-forge, not pip, in the conda GStreamer env
decisions.rationale: pip PySide6 wheels built against a different VC toolchain than conda-forge GStreamer. Qt6Core.dll fails symbol resolution. Documented in UAT Pitfall #1.

next_action: On Win11 VM: in musicstreamer/ui_qt/main_window.py add one temporary print in _on_station_activated (line ~294) to see what station.name is when the handler fires. Then git pull (no new code changes on main yet) → python -m musicstreamer → click Drone Zone → check console output + overlay.
context_notes: Phase 43.1 code-complete (Plans 01-05 + initial UAT fix). Stuck on UAT: backend constructs, buttons work, overlay appears, but music metadata (station name / ICY title / thumbnail) does NOT appear in the overlay in the real app — despite the isolated QApplication reproducer working correctly. Need to diagnose MainWindow's publish_metadata path. Suspect: _on_station_activated may not fire on this VM's click interaction, OR station.name is empty at that moment, OR something clears DisplayUpdater between our publish_metadata and Windows rendering. Revert any print statements before committing.
